name: Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 pound round steak, cubed (ground meat can be used instead - make sure it is very lean)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the steak, garlic, and onions in oil for about 15 minutes.
2. Add the corn, tomatoes, and chili powder dissolved in a little water. Cook for another 15 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Stir in the yellow corn meal, beaten eggs, milk, salt, pepper, stuffed olives, and butter. Mix well.
4. Pour the mixture into a 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 1 hour.
The juices from all ingredients were added to prevent the dish from being too dry. This is a hearty dish that pairs well with a simple salad. Enjoy!
